About

Web Performance & Simplicity

I'm passionate about making the web faster and more accessible for everyone. My work focuses on web performance optimization, benchmarking tools, and creating simple, efficient solutions to complex problems.

Focus Areas

  • Web Performance: Optimizing load times, runtime performance, and user experience
  • Benchmarking: Contributing to tools like Speedometer 3.0 that measure real-world performance
  • Simplicity: Building lightweight, maintainable solutions
  • Accessibility: Ensuring web content is usable by everyone

Current Work

Currently contributing to various web performance initiatives, including benchmark development and optimization techniques. You can find my latest projects and thoughts on this site.

Contact

Feel free to reach out if you'd like to discuss web performance, collaborate on projects, or share ideas about making the web better.
